NSBelasting

Hackathon_blackhole (heavy)

text

I mainly worked on the black hole for this one, if you scroll down carefully you will see it. Experimenting with SVG filters I tried to morph the background image with a displacement-map. If you have a strong enough computer I would advice to run it on full screen! It turned out to be some really heavy code to run, whoops.

Blobbify.note

This was one of my favorite projects that I got to do during this minor.

Hackathon_blackhole (heavy).note

I mainly worked on the black hole for this one, if you scroll down carefully you will see it. Experimenting with SVG filters I tried to morph the background image with a displacement-map. If you have a strong enough computer I would advice to run it on full screen! It turned out to be some really heavy code to run, whoops.
